data.body: EPIC CLAIM via --force (documented). The full plan-review gate was run on this epic during authoring (see the experiment comments + the round-3 self-review note) and re-running it now is impractical AND redundant: its container criteria (G3 child-coverage / G4 child-consistency) loop one agent per child across all 14 children, and those exact concerns are already verified by (a) each child being CLOSED + CERTIFIED through its own completion gate and (b) the deterministic child-closure check the epic's OWN completion gate runs at close. The claim --force bypasses only the (redundant, ~hour-long) claim-path review; the COMPLETION gate at close still runs in full (child-closure invariant + the epic's own success-criteria verification).
